products.title: LOOK 17
products.description: Look 17 embodies luminous femininity. The sweetheart-neckline tulle ballgown is fully embroidered with sequins, beads, and 3D organza flowers, creating a layered silhouette that radiates with ethereal brilliance.

products.title: LOOK 16
products.description: Look 16 captures the strength of form and light. The long-sleeved mermaid gown is fully embroidered and paired with a matching removable overskirt, bringing a sense of regal balance between structure and flow.

products.title: LOOK 15
products.description: Look 15 reveals a composition of soft romance and refined detail. The strapless gown is fully embroidered with 3D satin and organza flowers and complemented by a removable bolero, blending delicacy with modern versatility.

products.title: LOOK 14
products.description: Look 14 evokes the artistry of floral sculpting. The square-neckline ballgown is fully embroidered with 3D organza and tulle flowers, creating a silhouette alive with texture, movement, and luminous grace.

products.title: LOOK 13
products.description: Look 13 celebrates light through intricate craftsmanship. The fully embroidered strapless gown glimmers with lines of sequins, beads, and stones, paired with a matching overskirt that adds fluid depth and dimension.

products.title: LOOK 12
products.description: Look 12 channels the elegance of lace and structure in perfect harmony. The off-the-shoulder ballgown combines a basque waist with Chantilly and guipure lace, creating a silhouette that feels both architectural and romantic.

products.title: LOOK 11
products.description: Look 11 captures sculpted sophistication. The off-the-shoulder crepe cady mermaid gown features gentle draping along the bodice, tracing a refined line of movement that flatters the feminine form.

products.title: LOOK 10
products.description: Look 10 evokes a sense of regal refinement. The long-sleeved off-the-shoulder gown is fully embroidered in a silhouette that combines timeless grace with a subtle modern allure.

products.title: LOOK 9
products.description: Look 9 redefines classic elegance through architectural purity. The strapless Mikado ballgown features a dropped-waist corset that sculpts the silhouette with precision, emphasizing the strength of structure within soft volume.

products.title: LOOK 7
products.description: Look 7 captures the poetry of lightness. The strapless tulle A-line gown is embroidered with lace floral motifs, forming a delicate composition of texture and transparency that moves with effortless fluidity.

products.title: LOOK 8
products.description: Look 8 reveals the brilliance of embroidery in motion. The ballerina-neckline ballgown is fully embroidered with circular patterns of sequins and stones, creating a luminous surface that glows with refined dimension.

products.title: LOOK 5
products.description: Look 5 celebrates ethereal sophistication. The strapless ballgown is fully embroidered and paired with an embroidered cape, creating a vision of luminous layering where each detail enhances the gown’s fluid majesty.

products.title: LOOK 6
products.description: Look 6 evokes the strength of sculpted lines softened by movement. The jacquard mermaid gown features elegant draping across the bust and a matching removable overskirt, balancing structure and grace in perfect proportion.

products.title: LOOK 3
products.description: Look 3 embodies the elegance of sculpted simplicity. The Mikado ballgown reveals a ballerina neckline that enhances its voluminous form with understated grace, evoking the refined purity of a modern classic.

products.title: LOOK 4
products.description: Look 4 reflects a study in light and texture. The fully embroidered strapless mermaid gown shimmers with patterns of sequins and stones, complemented by a matching removable overskirt that adds depth and radiant movement.

products.title: LOOK 2
products.description: Look 2 captures the quiet allure of timeless craftsmanship. The dipped strapless Chantilly and guipure lace mermaid gown features intricate embroidery and a matching removable overskirt, creating a harmonious interplay of delicacy and contour.

products.title: Cady and Lace Long Dress
products.description: Sophisticated and sculpted, this evening gown in black cady is enriched with lace inserts and sheer detailing. The round neckline and long sleeves frame the silhouette, while a mermaid skirt extends to a floor-length finish, exuding timeless elegance.

products.title: Cady Long Dress
products.description: Bold and refined, this Luscious Red gown is designed in structured cady with a striking cape effect. The V-neckline and cape sleeves frame the silhouette, while a floor-length mermaid skirt adds graceful power to the elegant design.

products.title: Velvet Top
products.description: Minimal and refined, this black velvet top is designed with a high neckline and long sleeves, creating a sleek silhouette that finishes at the hip. Effortlessly versatile, it pairs beautifully with any ELIE SAAB skirt for a polished, chic look.

products.title: Velvet Embroidered Midi Skirt
products.description: Romantic and refined, this black midi skirt is designed in embroidered tulle with velvet accents. Floral embroidery enriches the flared silhouette, while side pockets add a modern, functional touch.

products.title: Flared Cady Pants
products.description: Elegant and tailored, these Absinthe Green pants are designed in structured cady with a high-rise waist and flared silhouette. Slash pockets add a practical touch, while the full-length cut enhances the elongated shape. Pair with the matching jacket for a polished ensemble.

products.title: Cady Jumpsuit
products.description: Striking and fluid, this Powder White jumpsuit is tailored in structured cady with a dramatic cape effect. A deep V-neckline and cape sleeves define the upper silhouette, while flared full-length pants add refined movement to the bold design.

products.title: Cady Jumpsuit
products.description: Striking and fluid, this Absinthe Green jumpsuit is tailored in structured cady with a dramatic cape effect. A deep V-neckline and cape sleeves define the upper silhouette, while flared full-length pants add refined movement to the bold design.

products.title: Lace Up Cady Blazer
products.description: Polished and modern, this blazer in Absinthe Green cady features a tailored collar and lapel with a single-breasted front. Lace-up details add a refined twist, while patch pockets and buttoned cuffs complete the below-the-hip silhouette. Pair with the matching pants for a coordinated look.

products.title: Embroidered Tulle and Cady Jumpsuit
products.description: Delicate yet structured, this Shadow Rose jumpsuit features an intricately embroidered tulle bodice and sleeves, paired with tailored cady flared pants. Framed by a round neckline and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, the silhouette is finished with slash pockets and a complementary leather belt for added definition.

products.title: Silk Long Dress
products.description: Soft and striking, this Absinthe Green gown in flowing georgette is defined by delicate ruffle details. The straight-across strapless neckline and semi-open back highlight the shoulders, while the flared skirt brings fluidity to the floor-length silhouette.

products.title: Silk Long Dress
products.description: Vibrant and flowing, this Marchesa Orange gown in silk georgette is adorned with cascading ruffle details. The halter V-neckline and open back lend refined allure, while the flared skirt completes the look with a graceful floor-length drop.

products.title: Silk Long Dress
products.description: Feminine and fluid, this Luscious Red gown in flowing georgette is defined by cascading ruffle details. The halter neckline and open back evoke graceful allure, while the flared skirt extends to a floor-length drop with soft movement.

products.title: Silk and Velvet Long Dress
products.description: Dramatic and fluid, this evening gown in Absinthe Green blends velvet and double georgette with sculptural silk draping. The halter V-neckline frames the open back, while a flared skirt flows to a graceful floor-length drop.

products.title: Cady Midi Dress
products.description: Sleek and refined, this black cocktail dress is tailored in structured cady with a dramatic cape effect. The V-neckline and cape sleeves create a striking silhouette, balanced by a pencil skirt that finishes at an elegant midi length.

products.title: Floral Bead Embroidered Dress
